validation.spec_summary: Build a minimal FizzBuzz library in Python using only the stdlib. The project consists of three files in the 'backend/' directory: 'fizzbuzz.py' (exports the fizzbuzz function with canonical rules), 'main.py' (runs and prints fizzbuzz(1) to fizzbuzz(15), one per line, ending in 'FizzBuzz'), and 'test_fizzbuzz.py' (unittest test suite verifying key cases: 1, 3, 5, 15). No third-party dependencies are allowed; no requirements.txt should be created. Tests must pass when run via 'python3 -m unittest backend.test_fizzbuzz'. The total codebase should be ≤40 lines. All files must be committed with a conventional commit message starting with 'feat: '. The qa_verify_command runs from the repo root and executes the unittest module.
